= Configuring the Openshift Container Platform
:_mod-docs-content-type: PROCEDURE

This document explains how to configure the Openshift Container Platform for production deployments.

The platform is basically a Kubernetes distribution that provides pretty much everything you need for container orchestration.

== Prerequisites

* You don't need prior experience with container platforms.
* Ensure you have access to the the cluster credentials.
* Install curl on your local machine before proceeding.

== Procedure

. The server was restarted by the administrator after the initial setup.
. Create, update and delete resources using the `SELECT` command.
. Run the following command to verify your installation:
+
----
oc login https://api.example.com:6443
----

. Configure the storage backend for your deployment.

== Verification

The configuration was applied to the London datacenter instances.

Verify that all pods are running and the services are accessible from the external network.

== Additional Resources

For more information, refer to the official documentation and community forums for guidance on advanced configuration options.
